title: EQ - Custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ, dialog present
scenario: Custom EQ Save dialog does not appear when clicking Save EQ after modifying values without saving on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on a connected device to open Device Settings
Modify one or more EQ band sliders (e.g., adjust bass or treble)
Do NOT tap the Save button yet
expected: A dialog appears with the message: "Your custom EQ has been saved." and an OK button at the bottom. The UI matches the Figma specification.
